text:
CLM_FULL_STD_PYMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: CLM_FULL_STD_PYMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: XXXXXX 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the amount field (CLM_FULL_STD_PMT_AMT) that is present on 
any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., sum of the CLM_FULL_STD_PMT_AMT reported on the 
claims that comprised the LTCH stay). 

This field is new in 2015. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
